target.description: URL, company name, or topic to analyze

format.description: Output format: grid, narrative, or brief (quick variant) / json+narrative (deep variant)

depth.description: Analysis depth: quick (simple 2x2) or deep (TOWS, quality gates, confidence scoring)

industry.description: Industry context for deep analysis (e.g. SaaS, fintech, healthcare)

description: SWOT analysis from findings or web research — routes to quick (2x2) or deep (TOWS + quality gates) based on depth
usage: strengths weaknesses opportunities threats, SWOT analysis, strategic assessment of, competitive position, TOWS
